base_http_status.name: HTTP Status Code Check
base_http_status.description: Probe a URL and check HTTP status code. 200 = account exists, 404/other = not found.

base_http_message.name: HTTP Body Message Check
base_http_message.description: Probe a URL and check response body for presence/absence strings.

base_http_headers.name: HTTP Headers Check
base_http_headers.description: Probe a URL and check response headers for expected patterns.
